programmes.show_description: Call Me Big Popper. Dr. Lee meets a patient with a big bump on his forehead. Plus, 30-year-old Shelby has developed mysterious bumps all over her body. S1, Ep4
The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma. Gerald returns to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his finger. Vinnie has an embarrassing birthmark on his neck. S2, Ep8
Tanisha's Story. Tanisha had a traumatic upbringing, suffering abuse from men. Like her super-obese drug addicted mum, she sought protection in food and her life is at risk. S5, Ep10
James K's Story. Weighing 791-lbs, James is bedridden, unable to stand, and can barely move his legs. He may only have a few months to live. Can bypass surgery save his life? S5, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Sky High Expectations. Nasreen travels from Dubai with only a few days to find her dream dress, whilst Kayleigh has a princess-style ball gown in mind but it has to be perfect. S1, Ep17

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Squabbling Sisters. Josie is frustrated when her sister and sister-in-law disagree over her wedding dress. Bronnie dreams of a modern sexy gown, but mum prefers a princess style! S1, Ep18

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Second-Time-Around. Bride Amy wants a sparkly dress to flaunt her figure after losing seven stone. Nellie is engaged for the second time and wants a lace gown to outshine her first. S1, Ep19

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Grooms & Fathers. Emma seeks a fairytale gown to match her wedding, but will dad and David see eye to eye? Meanwhile, tomboy Emma steps outside her comfort zone and into a gown. S1, Ep20
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Peggy Shaves Her Legs. When Peggy and Molly have lunch together, Mike worries that his mum is telling Molly unflattering stories about his childhood. S1, Ep19
Opening Day. Mike and Carl's annual pilgrimage to the Chicago Cubs' Opening Day is interrupted when Molly comes along. S1, Ep20
Samuel Gets Fired. When Samuel loses his job and apartment, Mike offers to let him stay at his place - with interesting results. S1, Ep21
The Story Of Another Mary. Inspired by his hero, Albert Einstein, Sheldon tries his hand at the violin. Also, Mary and Meemaw secretly buy a pregnancy test. S2, Ep17
A Perfect Score. Sheldon moves in with Dr. Sturgis for the weekend to experience college life. A lonely Mary tries to bond with the other Coopers during his absence. S2, Ep18
A Political Campaign. Unhappy that school funds are going toward football rather than academics, Sheldon decides to run for class president. S2, Ep19
The Date Night Variable. Howard discovers that he can't escape his mother - even in space! Back on earth, meanwhile, Raj turns his existence as a third wheel into an art form. S6, Ep1
The Decoupling Fluctuation. After learning Penny is thinking about breaking up with Leonard, Sheldon tries to intervene. Howard is being picked on in space by the astronauts. S6, Ep2
The Higgs Boson Observation. While the pressure of being in space starts to take its toll on Howard, Amy feels threatened when Sheldon hires a young female assistant, Alex. S6, Ep3
The Re-Entry Minimization. When Howard returns from space, he doesn't get the hero's welcome he expected. Meanwhile, Game Night turns into a battle of the sexes. S6, Ep4
The Holographic Excitation. The gang celebrates Halloween at Stuart's comic book store. Leonard and Penny discover a new spark in their relationship with a scientific seduction. S6, Ep5
The Extract Obliteration. Sheldon's friendship with renowned scientist Stephen Hawking is threatened by a game of 'Words with Friends.' S6, Ep6
The Habitation Configuration. Bernadette pressures Howard to move out of his mother's house. Sheldon finds himself caught in the middle of a fight between Amy and Wil Wheaton. S6, Ep7
The 43 Peculiarity. Howard and Raj try to understand why Sheldon disappears every afternoon at 2:45. Leonard and Penny wrestle with jealousy in their relationship. S6, Ep8
Cigar Talk. When Joyce invites Vince to attend her high school reunion, he confesses to Mike that he never graduated high school. S1, Ep22
Victoria's Birthday. Victoria panics as her 30th birthday approaches - and drags Mike and Molly into the drama of her life crisis. S1, Ep23
Peggy's New Beau. Mike feels pressured when Peggy's new boyfriend asks whether he and Molly hear wedding bells in their future. S1, Ep24
A Proposal And A Popsicle. Georgie is thrilled when Veronica stays at the Coopers' for a few days. Meanwhile, Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis celebrate their one-year anniversary. S2, Ep20
A Broken Heart. The Coopers help a broken-hearted Pastor Jeff through a rough patch in his marriage. Meanwhile, Sheldon pressures church members for donations. S2, Ep21
A Swedish Science Thing. Sheldon invites the entire school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements. Meanwhile, Meemaw learns more about Dr. Sturgis's past. S2, Ep22
The Parking Spot Escalation. When the University reassigns Sheldon's unused parking spot to Howard, the ensuing turf battle affects the whole gang. S6, Ep9
The Fish Guts Displacement. Sheldon plays nursemaid to a sick Amy, while Howard attempts to bond with his father-in-law on an upcoming fishing trip. S6, Ep10
The Santa Simulation. Sheldon unwillingly revisits some Christmas memories during a lively game of Dungeons and Dragons, while Raj joins the girls for ladies' night out. S6, Ep11
The Egg Salad Equivalency. Sheldon is accused of sexual harassment at the University and winds up dragging Leonard, Raj and Howard into the fray. S6, Ep12
The Bakersfield Expedition. Leonard's car is stolen when the guys take a road trip to a comic book convention in Bakersfield, dressed as Star Trek characters. S6, Ep13
The Cooper/Kripke Inversion. Outraged that he's being forced to work with his university nemesis, Barry Kripke, Sheldon faces a crisis of conscience. S6, Ep14
The Spoiler Alert Segmentation. When Sheldon and Leonard fight, it affects Penny and Amy's living arrangements. Meanwhile, Raj takes care of Mrs. Wolowitz while Howard is away. S6, Ep15
The Tangible Affection Proof. While the guys try to give their significant others the perfect Valentine's Day, Raj and Stuart throw a lonely people party at the comic book store. S6, Ep16
Prepare For Arrival. Emma comes clean on her birthday. Jovon heads to Anna's hometown. Lisa confronts Daniel about another woman, and Stig reassesses his relationship. S8, Ep10
Two Idiots On A Dirt Bike. Georgie's attempt to break up Missy and her new boyfriend backfires, with severe consequences. S1, Ep17
TV Money. Mandy tries to prove she's financially responsible after being called out on her poor spending habits, and Connor's girlfriend needs a place to stay. S1, Ep18
Dr. Lee Nose Best! Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Can Dr. Lee help? And, Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. S2, Ep9
Warning: Cystem Shutdown! Gerard has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size all over his body. Eric has a large bump on his head that he calls his 'on/off button.' S2, Ep10
Steven And Justin's Story Part 1. Steven weighs 800-lbs and his brother, Justin, 600-lbs. Desperate to save both his sons' lives, their father travels across the US to seek help. S5, Ep13
Steven And Justin's Story Part 2. After a year on a weight loss programme, Steven is non-compliant, and Justin focuses on a new career instead of his diet. Time is running out. S5, Ep14

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Sexy Versus Princess. Glamour model Danielle Lloyd is marrying for a second time and won't repeat the same dress mistakes! Jade tries a giant princess dress, but wants a sexy frock. S1, Ep21

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Fit For A Princess Bride. Nana is Ghanaian royalty and is running out of time to find her wedding gown, whilst Claire seeks something simple for her Windsor Castle wedding! S1, Ep22

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Bridal BFFs. Best friends Alice and Katie go wedding dress shopping together. One wants a classical gown, and the other seeks a shorter frock to wear with trainers. Can David help? S1, Ep23

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Culture Clash. Sophia wants a beaded dress hinting at her Pakistani and Cypriot heritage, and Chengetai seeks 'two-in-one' dress with a detachable skirt. Will her picky mum approve? S1, Ep24
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
An 8-Bit Princess. When Meemaw gives Sheldon his first video game, it takes over their lives. Meanwhile, George Sr. gets jealous when Georgie bonds with Herschel. S2, Ep8
Family Dynamics And Red Fiero. Sheldon studies his family for a psychology project when their Thanksgiving dinner turns into a fight after George Sr. is offered a job in Oklahoma. S2, Ep9
Stunted Childhood. When Sheldon learns that stunted childhoods can turn people into outcasts, he tries to act his age. Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis's relationship is tested. S2, Ep10
Race Of Superhumans. While Missy unknowingly becomes Sheldon's test subject, Georgie joins Mary's Bible study to spend more time with his crush, Veronica. S2, Ep11
Tummy Ache And Whale Metaphor. When Sheldon has to spend a few days in the hospital, he turns into the world's worst patient, and his behaviour takes a toll on everyone. S2, Ep12
Nuclear Reactor And Boy Lovey. While Sheldon attempts to build a nuclear reactor to power the neighbourhood, Georgie is heartbroken when he learns that Veronica has a boyfriend. S2, Ep13
Two Idiots On A Dirt Bike. Georgie's attempt to break up Missy and her new boyfriend backfires, with severe consequences. S1, Ep17
TV Money. Mandy tries to prove she's financially responsible after being called out on her poor spending habits, and Connor's girlfriend needs a place to stay. S1, Ep18
The Roommate Transmogrification. Mrs. Wolowitz ends up in the hospital after Howard tells her he's marrying Bernadette. While there, Leonard stresses over Penny and Priya. S4, Ep24
The Skank Reflex Analysis. Penny worries that she's screwed things up permanently with her friends after her night with Raj, while Sheldon takes command of the paintball team. S5, Ep1
The Pulled Groin Extrapolation. Leonard and Amy get to know each other better at a co-worker's wedding. Howard and Bernadette spend the weekend with Mrs. Wolowitz! S5, Ep3
The Wiggly Finger Catalyst. Raj is upset he's the only one of the four guys who's not in a relationship, so Penny sets out to find the perfect date. S5, Ep4
Russian Rocket Reaction, The. Sheldon and Leonard get invited to a housewarming party at Wil Wheaton's house. Howard gets an out-of-this-world opportunity! S5, Ep5
The Rhinitis Revelation. Craving a little motherly love, Sheldon competes with the gang for his mother's attention when she comes to visit. S5, Ep6
The Good Guy Fluctuation. A cute comic book artist tests Leonard's relationship with Priya, while Sheldon, getting into the Halloween spirit, tries to scare the guys. S5, Ep7
The Isolation Permutation. Amy is heartbroken when Bernadette and Penny go shopping for wedding dresses without her. S5, Ep8
The Ornithophobia Diffusion. Can friends with benefits still be friends without? Leonard and Penny try hanging out alone, while Sheldon must overcome his fear of birds. S5, Ep9
Flaming Spittoon Acquisition. Sheldon becomes jealous and considers taking his relationship with Amy to the next level when Stuart from the comic book store asks her out on a date. S5, Ep10
The Speckerman Recurrence. Leonard must face his fears after being contacted by his high school tormentor, while Penny realises that she might have been a bully herself. S5, Ep11
The Shiny Trinket Maneuver. Sheldon gets in trouble with Amy, and it's up to Penny to teach him how to be a better boyfriend. Howard deals with Bernadette's dislike of children. S5, Ep12
The Recombination Hypothesis. Everything might change when Leonard offers Penny a spur of the moment invitation to a romantic dinner for two on the 100th episode of the series. S5, Ep13
The Beta Test Initiation. Leonard and Penny experiment with dating again by 'beta testing' their relationship. Raj develops a weird bond with his phone's virtual assistant. S5, Ep14
The Friendship Contraction. Sheldon's selfish demands force Leonard to reconsider their friendship. Meanwhile, Howard tries to pick his astronaut nickname. S5, Ep15
The Vacation Solution. When Sheldon is forced to take a vacation by the university, he goes to work with Amy in her neurobiology lab. S5, Ep16
The Rothman Disintegration. When a corner office at the university opens, Sheldon must compete for it with his office nemesis, Barry Kripke. Penny gets an unusual gift from Amy. S5, Ep17
The Werewolf Transformation. A change in Sheldon's routine forces him to re-evaluate his entire life, when his barber is sick. Howard rethinks his decision to go into space. S5, Ep18
The Weekend Vortex. Sheldon chooses to participate in a guys-only weekend Star Wars gaming marathon rather than go with Amy to her aunt's birthday party. S5, Ep19
The Transporter Malfunction. It's a dream come true for Sheldon when he has a close encounter with his hero, Mr. Spock -legendary sci-fi icon Leonard Nimoy. S5, Ep20
Dara Ó Briain is joined by Rhys James, Alasdair Beckett-King, Ed Byrne, Janine Harouni, Hugh Dennis and Ellie Taylor to examine the week's events. S1, Ep7
Hijinks ensue as Street-smart Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to L.A. to help his buddies on the force solve a series of unusual robberies.
